title: Adult Residential Facility Complaints - 211info
text: - Radius - 5 Miles 10 Miles 25 Miles 50 Miles 100 Miles Search by Provider Name > New Search > Legal & Public Safety > Adult Residential Facility Complaints 1 Matching Service Providers The mapped locations are estimates, for the exact location of an individual site, select "More Details" Accessibility Options - Select - No Filter Wheelchair Access (Full) Wheelchair Access (Partial) Accessible Parking (Private Lot) Accessible Parking (Nearby Public/Street Parking) Accessible Restrooms Alternative Communication Formats Virtual Service Options Staff Trained in Disability Awareness Print & Share All Results X Print & Share Print PDF OREGON PATIENT SAFETY COMMISSION EARLY DISCUSSION AND RESOLUTION Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides a method to make complaints about mistreatment at health care facilities outside of the legal system using the Early Discussion and Resolution (EDR) process. A resolution may include an apology, answers to questions, improvements to care, or compensation. Qualifying events must have taken place in the state of Oregon on or after July 1, 2014. Eligibility: Individuals (or their representative) who experienced care at a healthcare facility or involving a healthcare provider that resulted in serious physical injury or death Hours: Monday-Friday 8am-5pm Email (503) 928-6158 Visit Website More Details No Mapping Information Available
